channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/18)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯圈挺热闹的，尤其是围绕着你关心的 AI、LLM 和 Coding 这几个领域。我发现几个特别有意思的趋势：一是 **AI 编程助手（像 Claude Code、Cursor）的生态越来越丰富了**，出现了不少提升它们能力的插件和技能包；二是 **本地运行 AI 编码代理** 成了热门讨论话题，很多人都在寻找隐私友好、功能强大的方案；三是 **AI Agent（智能体）的开发** 正在从“手工作坊”走向更工程化、更安全的阶段。感觉整个领域正在从早期的兴奋尝试，进入更务实、更深入的构建阶段。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯圈挺热闹的，尤其是围绕着你关心的 AI、LLM 和 Coding 这几个领域。我发现几个特别有意思的趋势：一是 **AI 编程助手（像 Claude Code、Cursor）的生态越来越丰富了**，出现了不少提升它们能力的插件和技能包；二是 **本地运行 AI 编码代理** 成了热门讨论话题，很多人都在寻找隐私友好、功能强大的方案；三是 **AI Agent（智能体）的开发** 正在从“手工作坊”走向更工程化、更安全的阶段。感觉整个领域正在从早期的兴奋尝试，进入更务实、更深入的构建阶段。

item.title: aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw
item.description: Fully autonomous & self-evolving research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. 🦞 | 近期热门 | 总 4503 stars
item.author: aiming-lab

item.title: calesthio/Crucix
item.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes. | 近期热门 | 总 3170 stars
item.author: calesthio

item.title: pasky/chrome-cdp-skill
item.description: Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open | 近期热门 | 总 2080 stars
item.author: pasky

item.title: Narcooo/inkos
item.description: Autonomous novel writing CLI agent — AI agents write, audit, and revise novels with human review gates | 近期热门 | 总 1476 stars
item.author: Narcooo

item.title: Infatoshi/OpenSquirrel
item.description: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it. | 近期热门 | 总 996 stars
item.author: Infatoshi

item.title: nikmcfly/MiroFish-Offline
item.description: Offline multi-agent simulation & prediction engine. English fork of MiroFish with Neo4j + Ollama local stack. | 近期热门 | 总 532 stars
item.author: nikmcfly

item.title: nikmcfly/MiroFish-Offline
item.description: Offline multi-agent simulation & prediction engine. English fork of MiroFish with Neo4j + Ollama local stack. | 近期热门 | 总 532 stars
item.author: nikmcfly

item.title: KeyID-AI/agent-kit
item.description: Give Claude/Cursor email powers. 27 MCP tools — inbox, send, reply, contacts, search. Free, no signup. | 近期热门 | 总 487 stars
item.author: KeyID-AI

item.title: LeDat98/NexusRAG
item.description: Hybrid RAG system combining vector search, knowledge graph (LightRAG), and cross-encoder reranking — with Docling document parsing, visual intelligence (image/table captioning), agentic streaming chat, and inline citations. Powered by Gemini or local Ollama models. | 近期热门 | 总 171 stars
item.author: LeDat98

item.title: matteorigodanza/cryto-trading-ai-assistant
item.description: AI guardian for manual crypto traders — risk monitoring, strategy validation & emotional trading detection. No trade execution. | 近期热门 | 总 120 stars
item.author: matteorigodanza
